questions.question: What are the contract names and their corresponding exchange names for contracts traded on 'CHICAGO BOARD OF TRADE'?
questions.gold_sparql:
SELECT ?contractName ?exchangeName FROM <https://omnix.dev/graphs/demo-tenant/kg/holdout-v2-cftc-swap-data> WHERE {
  ?contract <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#type> <https://omnix.dev/holdout-v2/holdout-v2-cftc-swap-data/type/Contract> .
  ?contract <https://omnix.dev/holdout-v2/holdout-v2-cftc-swap-data/pred/contract_on_exchange> ?exchange .
  ?exchange <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#type> <https://omnix.dev/holdout-v2/holdout-v2-cftc-swap-data/type/Exchange> .
  ?contract <https://omnix.dev/holdout-v2/holdout-v2-cftc-swap-data/pred/contract_name> ?contractName .
  ?exchange <https://omnix.dev/holdout-v2/holdout-v2-cftc-swap-data/pred/exchange_name> ?exchangeName .
  FILTER (?exchangeName = "CHICAGO BOARD OF TRADE")
}
full_expected_items: SOYBEAN OIL | CHICAGO BOARD OF TRADE
SOYBEAN MEAL | CHICAGO BOARD OF TRADE
ROUGH RICE | CHICAGO BOARD OF TRADE
MINI SOYBEANS | CHICAGO BOARD OF TRADE

It retrieves the `contract_name` and `exchange_name` and filters for exchanges named 'CHICAGO BOARD OF TRADE'. This meets the two-entity join, one relationship, and filter requirements. Both entity types are explicitly typed.

questions.question: List the asset classes and the number of contracts associated with each, for contracts with a commodity code starting with '00'.
questions.gold_sparql:
SELECT ?assetClass (COUNT(?contract) AS ?numberOfContracts) FROM <https://omnix.dev/graphs/demo-tenant/kg/holdout-v2-cftc-swap-data> WHERE {
  ?contract <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#type> <https://omnix.dev/holdout-v2/holdout-v2-cftc-swap-data/type/Contract> .
  ?contract <https://omnix.dev/holdout-v2/holdout-v2-cftc-swap-data/pred/contract_in_asset_class> ?assetClassEntity .
  ?assetClassEntity <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#type> <https://omnix.dev/holdout-v2/holdout-v2-cftc-swap-data/type/AssetClass> .
  ?assetClassEntity <https://omnix.dev/holdout-v2/holdout-v2-cftc-swap-data/pred/asset_class> ?assetClass .
  ?contract <https://omnix.dev/holdout-v2/holdout-v2-cftc-swap-data/pred/contract_commodity_code> ?commodityCode .
  FILTER (STRSTARTS(?commodityCode, "00"))
} GROUP BY ?assetClass ORDER BY DESC(?numberOfContracts)
questions.tier_classifier_reasoning: 2 distinct entity types connected by 1 predicate
questions.reasoning: This query connects `Contract` and `AssetClass` entities using the `contract_in_asset_class` relationship. It filters contracts by `contract_commodity_code` starting with '00' and then groups by `asset_class` to count the associated contracts. This fulfills the two-entity join, one relationship, filter, and aggregation criteria. Both entity types are explicitly typed.

questions.question: What are the contract names and their corresponding asset classes for contracts traded on the 'CHICAGO BOARD OF TRADE'?
questions.gold_sparql:
SELECT DISTINCT ?contract_name ?asset_class FROM <https://omnix.dev/graphs/demo-tenant/kg/holdout-v2-cftc-swap-data> WHERE {
  ?contract <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#type> <https://omnix.dev/holdout-v2/holdout-v2-cftc-swap-data/type/Contract> .
  ?contract <https://omnix.dev/holdout-v2/holdout-v2-cftc-swap-data/pred/contract_name> ?contract_name .
  ?contract <https://omnix.dev/holdout-v2/holdout-v2-cftc-swap-data/pred/contract_on_exchange> ?exchange .
  ?exchange <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#type> <https://omnix.dev/holdout-v2/holdout-v2-cftc-swap-data/type/Exchange> .
  ?exchange <https://omnix.dev/holdout-v2/holdout-v2-cftc-swap-data/pred/exchange_name> "CHICAGO BOARD OF TRADE" .
  ?contract <https://omnix.dev/holdout-v2/holdout-v2-cftc-swap-data/pred/contract_in_asset_class> ?assetClass .
  ?assetClass <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#type> <https://omnix.dev/holdout-v2/holdout-v2-cftc-swap-data/type/AssetClass> .
  ?assetClass <https://omnix.dev/holdout-v2/holdout-v2-cftc-swap-data/pred/asset_class> ?asset_class .
}
questions.expected_answer:
WHEAT-SRW | Agriculture
WHEAT-HRW | Agriculture
CORN | Agriculture
SOYBEAN OIL | Financial
SOYBEAN MEAL | Agriculture
OATS | Energy
SOYBEANS | Energy
MINI SOYBEANS | Energy
ROUGH RICE | Metals
questions.reasoning: This query uses Option A. It involves three distinct entity types: Contract, Exchange, and AssetClass. These are connected by two relationships: Contract -> Exchange and Contract -> AssetClass, forming a star shape around Contract. Each entity variable has an `rdf:type` triple. The query filters by a specific exchange name and retrieves contract names and their associated asset classes.

questions.question: For each report year, what is the average 'position_open_interest' for swap positions associated with contracts that have a 'contract_commodity_code' of '001'?
questions.gold_sparql:
SELECT ?report_year (AVG(xsd:float(?open_interest)) AS ?average_open_interest) FROM <https://omnix.dev/graphs/demo-tenant/kg/holdout-v2-cftc-swap-data> WHERE {
  ?position <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#type> <https://omnix.dev/holdout-v2/holdout-v2-cftc-swap-data/type/SwapPosition> .
  ?position <https://omnix.dev/holdout-v2/holdout-v2-cftc-swap-data/pred/position_open_interest> ?open_interest .
  ?position <https://omnix.dev/holdout-v2/holdout-v2-cftc-swap-data/pred/position_for_contract> ?contract .
  ?contract <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#type> <https://omnix.dev/holdout-v2/holdout-v2-cftc-swap-data/type/Contract> .
  ?contract <https://omnix.dev/holdout-v2/holdout-v2-cftc-swap-data/pred/contract_commodity_code> "001" .
  ?position <https://omnix.dev/holdout-v2/holdout-v2-cftc-swap-data/pred/position_on_date> ?reportDate .
  ?reportDate <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#type> <https://omnix.dev/holdout-v2/holdout-v2-cftc-swap-data/type/ReportDate> .
  ?reportDate <https://omnix.dev/holdout-v2/holdout-v2-cftc-swap-data/pred/report_year> ?report_year .
} GROUP BY ?report_year
ORDER BY ?report_year
questions.reasoning: This query uses Option A. It involves three distinct entity types: SwapPosition, Contract, and ReportDate. These are connected by two relationships: SwapPosition -> Contract and SwapPosition -> ReportDate, forming a star shape around SwapPosition. Each entity variable has an `rdf:type` triple. It calculates the average 'position_open_interest' grouped by 'report_year' for a specific 'contract_commodity_code'.

questions.question: Find the contract names for contracts that have swap positions with a 'position_swap_long' greater than 100000 and are associated with an asset class of 'Energy'.
questions.reasoning: This query uses Option A. It involves three distinct entity types: Contract, SwapPosition, and AssetClass. These are connected by two relationships: Contract -> SwapPosition and Contract -> AssetClass, forming a star shape around Contract. Each entity variable has an `rdf:type` triple. It filters for 'position_swap_long' values greater than 100000 and an 'asset_class' of 'Energy', then returns the distinct contract names.
